sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this sports simulation

special_mechanics.name: Football Physics
special_mechanics.description: Sports simulation game focused on football gameplay mechanics rather than character movement physics

tier_notes: Madden NFL '94 is a sports simulation title, not a platformer or action game. Movement parameters for player characters (quarterbacks, receivers, etc.) are not documented in available sources. Wikipedia documentation focuses on gameplay features (play-calling, screen rotation, Super Bowl teams) and development history rather than technical movement physics. No quantitative physics data is documented for this tier.
